form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr2) over 1720m at Penrith beaten 25 m by Angus Finn (2:01.00) in NR up to 62 on March 5 at $31. At the run before broke in score up and was out of position at the start 9th (Sr1) over 1720m at Penrith beaten 16 m by Slyx (2:03.60) in NR up to 58 on February 19 at $26.30. Gets the ace draw so could strike first up for the new yard.

form.formComment: Fair performance when beaten by 4.5 m finishing fifth behind Allstarzzz Frankie at this track over 1730m in a 4yo+ NR up to 80 GH on March 25 at $16. Then a handy effort when beaten by 4.5 m finishing third behind She The Devil at this track over 1730m in a NR up to 57 on April 1 at $8. Draws well so is one of the key runners.
